Free Tools

Free Conversion Optimization Tools

Powerful, free tools to help you understand and improve your website's conversion rate. No signup required.

Analysis
E-commerce Store Analyzer
Get instant analysis of your online store with a conversion health score. Discover optimization opportunities across speed, UX, trust signals, and more. Completely free and unlimited.
  • Instant conversion health score
  • Real-time store scanning
  • 50+ factors analyzed automatically
  • Unlimited free use
Analytics
Conversion Rate Calculator
Calculate your website's conversion rate and get personalized insights on how to improve it. Includes industry benchmarks and revenue impact analysis.
  • Instant conversion rate calculation
  • Industry benchmark comparisons
  • Personalized improvement recommendations
  • Revenue impact projections
Optimization
Landing Page Checklist
Get a customized optimization checklist based on your business type and growth stage. Know exactly what to prioritize for maximum conversion impact.
  • Personalized to your business type
  • Stage-specific recommendations
  • Priority-based action items
  • Interactive progress tracking

Want More Advanced Analysis?

Get comprehensive AI-powered website analysis with detailed recommendations, A/B testing suggestions, and ongoing conversion tracking.

TTMDTalk to me Data

Signal intelligence for sales teams. Find companies using your competitors' tools — from job postings and reviews.
